recommendations.title: The Six Wives of Henry Lefay
recommendations.overview: A presumed-dead man's current wife and former wives squabble over his funeral arrangements.

recommendations.title: Bloodsucking Bastards
recommendations.overview: A down on his luck cubicle worker and his slacker best friend discover their new boss is a vampire who is turning their coworkers into the un-dead.

recommendations.title: Griffin & Phoenix
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill man falls in love with a woman who has a secret that threatens their time spent together.

recommendations.title: Christmas Inheritance
recommendations.overview: To inherit her father's company, socialite Ellen must first visit his small hometown, where she learns the value of hard work and helping others.

recommendations.title: Suddenly
recommendations.overview: The tranquility of a small town is marred only by sheriff Tod Shaw's unsuccessful courtship of widow Ellen Benson, a pacifist who can't abide guns and those who use them. But violence descends on Ellen's household willy-nilly when the U.S. President

recommendations.title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers
recommendations.overview: Six years after being presumed dead in a fire, and just as the town prepares to finally celebrate Halloween again, Michael Myers returns to Haddonfield to continue his reign of terror.

recommendations.title: Ellen DeGeneres: Relatable
recommendations.overview: In her first special since 2003, Ellen revisits her road to stardom and details the heartfelt -- and hilarious -- lessons she's learned along the way.
